title: Facilities & centers
description: Learn more about the places where science happens at SLAC: our major facilities, institutes and centers.
text: SLAC is known for building big sophisticated machines for teasing out the secrets of the universe. They give researchers new eyes on the world, spurring discoveries that spark new inventions in a continuous cycle. In our large-scale facilities and research centers, scientists take advantage of specialized tools and expertise and collaborate with colleagues from a wide range of fields.
